# Cloak of Lórien

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** character.
Limit 1 per character.
Attached character gets +1 DEF (+2 DEF instead if the active location has the **_Forest_** trait).
